message:
fix(scheduler): fix worker shutdown hang in ThreeLaneWorker backoff loop

The inner backoff loop in ThreeLaneWorker::run_loop() never checked the
shutdown flag, causing workers to park/wake/spin indefinitely after
shutdown() was called. Add shutdown check at the start of the backoff
loop so workers exit promptly. Fixes 3 hanging tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
